system.description: Hellebore: This black flower causes swelling and eventually leads to cardiac arrest. It is quite potent, prompting symptoms in seconds and death in just 1d10 minutes. Hellebore must be consumed. Hellebore is easy to find and grows around the Yao Yun Sea. It requires a TN 4 Talent (Poison) roll or TN 6 Survival roll.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 2: Rules
system.remedy: Yellow Phoenix Pills or corresponding antidote
